title: hieracium bourgaei subsp. sclerophyllum
intro: Hieracium bourgaei subsp. sclerophyllum, also known as Sclerophyllous Hawk's Beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bourgaei subsp. sclerophyllum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
